data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplifies navigation with a limited number of choices.
data.technical_spec: Minimalistic design to ensure quick decision-making.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Design focused on making interaction targets easily selectable.
data.technical_spec: Large, easily clickable buttons and touch targets.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Creates appealing interfaces to enhance usability perception.
data.technical_spec: Consistent color schemes and modern design elements.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Utilizes familiar navigation patterns users expect.
data.technical_spec: Consistent UI elements derived from common mobile app conventions.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Limits information presented at one time to improve processing.
data.technical_spec: Uses carousels and minimal prose to focus attention.
